Xylem is a global water technology leader with durable utility relationships, specification-driven equipment brands, and a growing outsourced services platform built through the Evoqua combination. FY2025 free cash flow was approximately $3.73 per share on $910 million of free cash flow, and Q1 2026 revenue grew 2.7% t

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Premium valuation embeds continued margin expansion and mid-single-digit owner-cash growth; any Measurement margin relapse or municipal capex pause forces multiple compression.
Measurement margin pressure: Operating margin 11.7% in 2025 versus 13.2% in 2024; smart-metering competition may persist (10-K segment note).
Integration and restructuring: $133 million restructuring/realignment in 2025; management guides $40 to $55 million for full-year 2026. Charges must convert to sustained margin, not recurring drag.
